title: AFI Enrichment Category Result — aiMl v1 (afi.enrichment.aiml.v1)
description: The canonical output contract for the 'aiMl' open analysis lane: the ONE resolved result an aiMl provider/plugin (e.g. Tiny Brains) contributes to the scorer-facing join (afi.enrichment.aiml.v1). A provider-produced aiMl result MUST pass this validation at the provider-adapter edge BEFORE it reaches scoring (PBF-GOV D-PBF-8); a malformed result never reaches the scorer. The category marker MUST be 'aiMl'. An aiMl provider may internally run several models (an ensemble), but it contributes exactly ONE resolved, model-neutral result at the pipeline boundary (D-PBF-2) — the scorer never sees multiple internal models. The result carries a bounded forecast (direction + normalized conviction) and, when justified, a bounded regime classification and a risk flag. This mission ships the CONTRACT ONLY: no aiMl runtime adapter is implemented here. The result carries no chain-of-thought, no model prose, no raw LLM response, no raw tensor, no hosted-provider authority/identity, no model-provider request id, no credential material, and no scoring/UWR/rank/reward.
$comment: BOUNDARY: category-result payload contract — validates a runtime category output, not a stored artifact; the discriminator is the 'category' marker. Referenced by the analysis-plugin outputSchemaRef 'afi.enrichment.aiml.v1' (the schema path/ref is lowercase 'aiml'; the runtime category marker is camelCase 'aiMl', matching AnalysisCategory). additionalProperties:false at every object level, plus label fields constrained by pattern (no whitespace), leave no room for prose, a raw tensor, a params bag, a provider id, or a credential-like field. Output semantics are model-neutral: a single resolved forecast, never a per-model breakdown.
x-afiPartOf: AFI Provider Adapter & BYOK Foundations v0.1 (PBF-GOV)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/provider-byok-foundations-v0.1 (PBF-GOV) D-PBF-2/D-PBF-8 — one resolved result per category; provider output passes canonical category validation before scoring

afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 (FCP-GOV) D-FCP-1/D-FCP-5 — the 'aiMl' open analysis lane; conforming providers/plugins are administrative registry updates, not per-participant governance

category.description: Category marker. MUST be 'aiMl' — the deterministic one-per-category join classifies contributions by this marker.

forecast.description: The single resolved, model-neutral forecast the aiMl lane contributes.

direction.description: Suggested directional bias. Model-neutral classification, not a scoring judgment.

conviction.description: Normalized confidence in the direction in [0,1]. Not a reward, rank, or UWR weight.

horizon.description: OPTIONAL cadence/horizon the forecast applies to.

regime.description: OPTIONAL bounded regime classification (justified by current Tiny Brains regime output).

label.description: Model-neutral regime label token (no whitespace, max 64 chars) — e.g. 'calm_bull'. The pattern rejects prose/chain-of-thought.

confidence.description: OPTIONAL confidence in the regime label in [0,1].

riskFlag.description: OPTIONAL model-neutral risk flag (e.g. elevated-risk conditions detected).
